SharedFile.title: SharedFile
SharedFile.description: Secure file share record stored in the cloud

size.description: Size of the file in bytes

uploadedAt.description: ISO timestamp of when the file was uploaded

storagePath.description: Internal cloud storage path of the file

downloadUrl.description: Public direct download link from storage

passwordHash.description: SHA-256 hash or simple string for optional password protection

downloadCount.description: Total number of times this file has been downloaded

analytics.description: Array of map structures recording download interactions

/shared_files/{fileId}.description: Individual file hosting and secure access parameters
